original.query: I’m drafting a short personal reflection about how someone close to me shaped the way I understand where I come from. If I want to explain why a moment of criticism from that person later turned into the spark that made me re-examine my identity—and also led to me learning something foundational about the story behind a basic part of who I am—who is the person I should focus on?
